msk.batchscramsecret.CfnAbout: Represents a secret stored in the Amazon Secrets Manager that can be used to authenticate with a cluster using a user name and a password.

msk.batchscramsecret.ClusterArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MSK cluster.

msk.batchscramsecret.SecretArnList.Description: A list of Amazon Secrets Manager secret ARNs.
